m	Z

message
nonce
returnc
    Encrypt the given ``message`` using the IETF ratified chacha20poly1305
    construction described in RFC7539.
    :param message:
    :type message: bytes
    :param aad:
    :type aad: Optional[bytes]
    :param nonce:
    :type nonce: bytes
    :param key:
    :type key: bytes
    :return: authenticated ciphertext
    :rtype: bytes
    
 Input message type must be bytes
raising
%Message must be at most {} bytes longN
%Additional data must be bytes or None
,Nonce must be a {} bytes long bytes sequence
*Key must be a {} bytes long bytes sequencer
unsigned long long *
unsigned char[]
Encryption failed.)
isinstance
bytes
	TypeError
lenr
format

)crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_encrypt

buffer

_aad

mxout
clen
ciphertext
?/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/nacl/bindings/crypto_aead.pyr-
    Decrypt the given ``ciphertext`` using the IETF ratified chacha20poly1305
    construction described in RFC7539.
    :param ciphertext:
    :type ciphertext: bytes
    :param aad:
    :type aad: Optional[bytes]
    :param nonce:
    :type nonce: bytes
    :param key:
    :type key: bytes
    :return: message
    :rtype: bytes
    
#Input ciphertext type must be bytesr
(Ciphertext must be at most {} bytes longNr
Decryption failed.)
*_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_CRYPTBYTES_MAXr)
)crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_ietf_decryptr.
    Encrypt the given ``message`` using the "legacy" construction
    described in draft-agl-tls-chacha20poly1305.
    :param message:
    :type message: bytes
    :param aad:
    :type aad: Optional[bytes]
    :param nonce:
    :type nonce: bytes
    :param key:
    :type key: bytes
    :return: authenticated ciphertext
    :rtype: bytes
    r
$crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_encryptr.
    Decrypt the given ``ciphertext`` using the "legacy" construction
    described in draft-agl-tls-chacha20poly1305.
    :param ciphertext: authenticated ciphertext
    :type ciphertext: bytes
    :param aad:
    :type aad: Optional[bytes]
    :param nonce:
    :type nonce: bytes
    :param key:
    :type key: bytes
    :return: message
    :rtype: bytes
    r:
%_aead_chacha20poly1305_CRYPTBYTES_MAXr)
$crypto_aead_chacha20poly1305_decryptr.
    Encrypt the given ``message`` using the long-nonces xchacha20poly1305
    construction.
    :param message:
    :type message: bytes
    :param aad:
    :type aad: Optional[bytes]
    :param nonce:
    :type nonce: bytes
    :param key:
    :type key: bytes
    :return: authenticated ciphertext
    :rtype: bytes
    r
*crypto_aead_xchacha20poly1305_ietf_encryptr.
    Decrypt the given ``ciphertext`` using the long-nonces xchacha20poly1305
    construction.
    :param ciphertext: authenticated ciphertext
    :type ciphertext: bytes
    :param aad:
    :type aad: Optional[bytes]
    :param nonce:
    :type nonce: bytes
    :param key:
    :type key: bytes
    :return: message
    :rtype: bytes

*crypto_aead_xchacha20poly1305_ietf_decryptr.
